name: warp
hints: Another warp zone. You'll be transported somewhere automatically.
This warp connects to various areas. No manual exits - just wait for transport.
Warp zone reached from the fuzzy area (room 16) via S/E/W. Transports you automatically.
notes: Warp zone reached from the fuzzy area (room 16) via S/E/W. Automatically transports the player. Different from warp room 17 (field warp).
